summary: P0 Bug Fix Verification - Iteration 126: Verified idempotency guard on initialize_declarative_phase() and is_self_declaration preservation in submit_sheet(). All 9 unit tests pass for idempotency guard, all presences flow tests pass, all strong proof lockdown tests pass. API endpoints verified working: /api/attendance-sheets/pending, /api/disputes/mine, /api/appointments/.

idempotency_guard_unit_tests.test_1_guard_blocks_reentry_on_collectin: PASS - Re-entry blocked, deadline unchanged, no duplicate sheets
idempotency_guard_unit_tests.test_8_full_1v1_disagreement_flow: PASS - Full flow works correctly with guard active, dispute created

presences_flow_tests.test_no_disputes_before_submission: PASS - No dispute before Presences submission

strong_proof_lockdown_tests.test_gps_outside_radius_not_admissible: PASS - GPS outside radius → NOT admissible

idempotency_guard.description: Guard blocks re-entry when phase is already collecting/analyzing/disputed/resolved. Only None and 'not_needed' are safe entry points.

is_self_declaration_preservation.description: Original declaration map preserves is_self_declaration field when creating updated_declarations in submit_sheet()

strong_proof_lockdown.description: GPS/QR/Video/NLYT Proof >= 55 → auto-confirmation, no manual_review, no Presences phase

critical_code_review_comments: Idempotency guard correctly implemented at lines 42-54 of declarative_service.py
is_self_declaration field correctly preserved via original_decl_map at lines 179-198
All 9 idempotency guard unit tests pass
All strong proof lockdown tests pass (9 tests)
API endpoints working correctly with proper authentication

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/19 pytest tests + 9 idempotency + 5 presences + 9 lockdown = 42 total tests passed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data and test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified: idempotency guard on initialize_declarative_phase() prevents re-entry when phase is already collecting/analyzing/disputed/resolved. is_self_declaration field is now preserved through submit_sheet(). Key test files: test_idempotency_guard.py (9 tests), test_presences_flow.py (5 tests), test_strong_proof_lockdown.py (9 tests). API routes: /api/attendance-sheets/* (not /api/presences/*), /api/disputes/mine (not /api/disputes). Note: appointments endpoint requires trailing slash (/api/appointments/) due to 307 redirect.
